calendar.matters:
Petition For Relief From Claim Requirement
Off Calendar Feb-15-2018 Denied
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Samuel Ray, Deputy City Attorney 415-554-3868 for Respondent City and Coutny of San Francisco.
No other appearance.

RULING - The matter is Uncontested. The Court adopts the tentative ruling as follows:

PETITIONER FRANCES SMITH's Petition For Relief From Claim Requirement (G.C. Code 946.6)

Petitioner Frances Smith's petition for relief from claim is denied. Ms. Smith did not make an adequate evidentiary showing that her failure to file a timely claim was due to mistake, inadvertence, surprise or excusable neglect.

Order is signed. (see scanned order for details)

Judge: Harold Kahn, Clerk: M. Goodman, Not Reported. (D302/HK)
